### Research-use-only acknowledgment

- [ ] I understand that BIKO GenomeBoard produces a **research reference
  document** for independent review by a researcher or clinician, and
  that this feature request is framed accordingly — not as a request
  for clinical-decision-instrument behavior, CLIA-baseline features,
